top_signals.title: Gold Swings in Volatile Session After Fresh US-Iran Strikes
top_signals.summary: Gold fluctuated after hitting the lowest since November, following a fresh round of US strikes against Iran that raised the stakes in a war that has roiled global markets and stoked inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Avalanche Treasury Co set to start trading on Nasdaq as crypto proxy trade evolves
top_signals.summary: Avalanche is a six-year-old blockchain built for business that counts BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and Apollo among its users.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: TIA asking FMCSA for guidance on approved carriers post-Montgomery
top_signals.summary:
The Transportation Intermediaries Association is asking FMCSA to take steps more clearly defining safe carriers.

The post TIA asking FMCSA for guidance on approved carriers post-Montgomery appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: MFS auditors investigated by UK accountancy regulator
top_signals.summary: FRC probes firms that signed off accounts across collapsed UK mortgage lender’s network
